build_spec.name: csv_profile
build_spec.description: Profile small CSV files supplied through driver manifest file URLs.

tools.name: profile_csv
tools.description: Return row count, column names, numeric totals, and refund-related outliers from CSV text.
tools.result_description: JSON object with row_count, columns, totals, and suspicious_rows.

build_spec.hints: Use Python stdlib csv, decimal, and statistics only. Do not read local paths; callers pass file contents from manifest URLs.

build_spec.name: refund_policy_check
build_spec.description: Evaluate profiled order/refund facts against a markdown refund policy.

tools.name: check_refund_policy
tools.description: Return policy violations, risk labels, and recommended review actions.
tools.result_description: JSON object with violations, risk_level, and recommended_actions.

build_spec.hints: Use deterministic string and numeric rules. Do not call external services.
